this is more targeted at the customer success roles, challenges, and any efficiency improvements they can make.

process.

Let me find it.

Like,

No, that – That's just, like, doesn't say what we said in the call.
Okay.

We need to do more than just, like, blog posts.
Yeah.
Okay.
Let me know, yeah, what comes out of that conversation.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Datagrid's business is thriving since launch in October, with revenue closely following traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on 4 pillars: sales acceleration, proposal/project management, customer intelligence, AI at scale](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Emphasis on construction AI, project management, and government agency content requested](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Newsletter implementation to be discussed with Marcel, potentially added to current workstreams](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Topics

### Datagrid Business Performance

  - [Launched in October, showing strong revenue growth closely tied to traffic](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Thiago shared a graph demonstrating impressive quarter-end results](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Content Strategy Update

  - [Four content pillars developed: sales acceleration, proposal/project management, customer intelligence, AI at scale](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Topics mapped out for next 3 months in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Focus on high-level content first, then diving into specific industry verticals](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Thiago requested emphasis on project management, construction AI, and PMOs](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Avoid mentioning competitors in construction AI content](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

### SEO and Content Refresh

  - [Pruning list of \~100 URLs with zero visits to improve overall content quality](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [List of content refreshes created for articles losing position/traffic or with potential for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO work stream pending web dev team support](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Website Redesign

  - [Expected launch in couple weeks, before Groundbreak event](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Will include case studies, customer stories, and agent marketplace](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Performance Update

  - [Sessions near all-time highs despite Google reporting issues](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [AI agents for government agencies content catching up to top performers](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Referral traffic from Perplexity surpassing ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)

### Customer Use Cases

  - [Document review tasks are a major pain point for customers](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Examples: code compliance checks, bid reviews in government agencies](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [AI solving issues of talent retention and improving employee satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)

### Newsletter Discussion

  - [Current SOW doesn't include newsletter implementation](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Thiago expressed interest in starting newsletter sooner](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Team to confirm details with Marcel and potentially adjust priorities](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Double down on construction AI and project management content](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Develop content for government agencies, including state-level transportation departments](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Thiago to discuss newsletter implementation with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Team to keep Thiago updated on any changes to workstreams or priorities](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Continue with planned content strategy while awaiting clarification on additional initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/dTJCGCxWnhdzJAiKxdXDDeGENUrG-2eu?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)

action_items.description: Double down on construction AI & project management content; focus on PMOs, construction, manufacturers, industrial supply, supply chain
Create content on construction AI without mentioning competitors; position Datagrid as only construction AI tool
Develop content on government agencies (FBI, NSA, state-level transportation) adopting AI; focus on regional/state-level opportunities
Write about AI in transportation, aviation, DoT; emphasize talent retention, efficiency improvement, cost-cutting
Confirm details of contract addendum, specifically regarding newsletter and agent marketplace
Meet with Marcel tonight to clarify contract terms re: newsletter & agent marketplace inclusion
